curated.title: Azin Travel Air Arabia Promo
curated.desc: Teal social media post for Azin Travel with a plane bursting out of a phone screen, suitcase and Eiffel Tower collage, announcing special Air Arabia fares with Herat office contact details.

curated.title: Azin Travel Logo
curated.desc: Circular teal logo mark for Azin Travel: a negative-space airplane carved into layered wave shapes, with English and Dari wordmarks.

curated.title: Ontario Door Supply Logo
curated.desc: Brown line-art open-door logo and wordmark for Ontario Door Supply presented on a banner with angled photo panels of wooden doors.

curated.title: Ontario Door Supply Business Card
curated.desc: Business card design for the director of Ontario Door Supply (London, Ontario) with brown diagonal panels, contact icons, and a door photo on the right edge.

curated.title: Golden Egg Logo Concepts
curated.desc: Three logo variations for Golden Egg (Tokhm Tala) on dark navy: a gold egg with 3D Dari lettering, a crowned striped egg badge, and a geometric orange rooster mark.

curated.title: Azin Travel Promo Video
curated.desc: Promotional video frame: a 3D-rendered desk scene with a laptop showing the Azin Travel Facebook page, surrounded by a passport, map, compass, tickets, and sunglasses.

curated.title: Azin Travel Logo Animation
curated.desc: After Effects logo reveal for Azin Travel: the circular teal plane badge centered on a bright blue gradient background.

curated.title: Azin Travel Ad Teaser
curated.desc: Only a blurry 320px video thumbnail of passports on a world map survives; no video file and no usable still, and the Azin Travel video work is already covered by posts 11-12.

curated.desc: Eid greeting animation frame for Khooban Cola: a large 3D icosahedron wrapped in white Arabic calligraphy on a festive set with stylized palm trees and colorful geometric ornaments.

curated.title: LER Canada Poster — Scissor Lift
curated.desc: Light orange/navy ad poster for London Equipment Rentals featuring a JLG scissor lift, 'Elevate Efficiency' headline, feature icons and Learn More CTA.

curated.desc: Dark navy/orange variant of the LER 'Elevate Efficiency' poster with a tall scissor lift, curved swoosh shapes and feature checklist.

curated.title: LER Canada Poster — Boom Lift
curated.desc: Navy/orange LER poster showing an articulated JLG boom lift with golden line accents, 'Elevate Efficiency' headline and feature checkmarks.

curated.title: LER Canada Web Banner
curated.desc: Wide horizontal banner for London Equipment Rentals with scissor lift and boom lift on split gold/white panels, phone number and URL.

curated.title: Jawad Ebtekar Logo

curated.title: Shiba Detergent Motion Graphic
curated.desc: Only a tiny 320px abstract video thumbnail (iridescent glass swirls) survives; no video file or usable still of the Shiba detergent animation.

curated.title: Red Bull 3D Animation
curated.desc: Photoreal 3D render of three tilted Red Bull cans on a grey studio backdrop with shallow depth of field; frame from a spec product animation.

curated.desc: 3D animation frame of a red soda can floating on a pink backdrop, ringed by flying strawberries and carbonation bubbles.

curated.title: Apple Watch Ultra Teaser
curated.desc: Tiny 320px video thumbnail of an Apple Watch Ultra crown close-up; no video file or larger still available, unusable for gallery.

curated.title: Safa Tyor Recipe Reels

curated.title: Green Apple Dental Reel

curated.title: Anar Dara Eid Logo Reveal

curated.title: Eid Greeting 3D Animations
curated.desc: Two 3D-rendered Eid al-Fitr greeting videos: a glowing gold ornamental lantern over a spinning geometric-pattern disc, and a blue mosque-and-crescent night scene branded for Heydari Dental Clinic.

curated.title: Octane Software Promo
curated.desc: Only a 320px stock-footage thumbnail of a businessman at a desk; no video file and no visible Octane branding — unusable as a portfolio still.

curated.title: Idea Afghan Animation

curated.title: Shafa Pomegranate Teaser

curated.title: Pamir Cola Product Visuals

curated.desc: Wide blue billboard artwork for the Hi Milk dairy range (cream, milk, cream cheese) with Dari tagline 'everything starts with Hi' — same artwork seen installed in post 318.

curated.desc: High-end CGI pack renders for Hi Milk: cocoa milk carton wrapped in a chocolate-and-milk splash, and pistachio milk carton with flying pistachios on blue and sage backgrounds.

curated.title: Hi Milk Pistachio Pack Creative
curated.desc: Continuation of the Hi Milk pistachio campaign (post 320): the carton nested inside an open pistachio shell, plus a back-of-pack render showing nutrition facts and the Pamir Cola logo.

curated.desc: AI-generated aerial drone footage over an endless orange orchard, teasing the launch of Deniz orange beverage; frame1 and vthumb are duplicates of the cover frame.

curated.desc: AI-generated painterly scene of lemon branches framing a sparkling Mediterranean-style sea, teaser for Shafa Lemonade; other stills are duplicates.

curated.title: Shafa Lemonade Football Spot
curated.desc: AI-generated video frame of footballers in red kits dribbling on a sunlit pitch, part of a Shafa Lemonade ad; no product visible in the extracted stills.

curated.title: Pamir Cola AI Ad Series
curated.desc: Three cinematic AI-generated ad scenes: a Shafa Cola contour bottle at a lavish Afghan feast table, Deniz orange cans on a beach picnic spread, and an ornate palace interior with copper fruit bowls.

curated.title: Hi Milk Billboard, Gulha Square
curated.desc: Street photo of a second installed Hi Milk billboard at Chowk-e Gulha, Kabul, showing the dairy range artwork (honey cream, milk, cream cheese) on a dark blue background.

curated.title: Pomegranate Seeds AI Macro
curated.desc: AI-generated macro video frame of translucent pomegranate seeds floating on a deep red gradient background (Seedance AI + After Effects); frame1 is a duplicate of frame0.

curated.title: Smoking Glass AI Study
curated.desc: AI-generated cinematic video frame of an empty faceted glass with smoke rising, black background and warm bokeh lights (Seedance AI + After Effects); frame1 duplicates frame0, vthumb is low-res.

curated.title: Hi Milk Street Billboard
curated.desc: Street photo of an installed roadside billboard in Kabul advertising Hi-brand milk and dairy products with Dari tagline.

curated.title: CyborgTech Exhibition Booth
curated.desc: Event photo of two men posing in front of a signed CyborgTech Creative Agency backdrop at a Kabul exhibition; personal photo, not design work.

curated.title: Pamir Cola Golden Logo
curated.desc: Polished golden metallic rendering of the Pamir Cola mountain-and-wave logo with gold wordmark on a white background.

final.title: Shafa Key Visual Series
blurb: Hero key visuals for the Shafa beverage range — cola, orange, limonade, pomegranate and the fruit-juice line — built as dramatic Photoshop composites.
Spiraling liquid splashes, sunset beaches and orchard scenes give every flavor its own cinematic stage.

final.title: Hype Energy CGI Series
blurb: Fifteen CGI product shots of the Hype Energy MFP and candy-striped Buzz Marshmallow cans, staged from beach splashes and neon streaks to night streets and gaming rooms.
Blender animations and a SORA-assisted Lamborghini spot extend the cans into motion.

final.title: Safa Tyor Food Campaign
blurb: A full food content system for Safa Tyor poultry: a red-branded step-by-step recipe carousel plus eight vertical reels mixing filmed and AI-generated footage.
Glazed chicken, bolani and a Ramadan iftar table carry the rooster brand across Instagram with Dari copy throughout.

final.title: Hi Dairy Packaging
blurb: Packaging for the 'hi' dairy line — milk, cream, cocoa, pistachio, banana, date and honey-cream tetra packs rendered in high-end CGI.
A chocolate-and-milk splash wrap and a carton nested inside an open pistachio shell push FMCG packshots into campaign territory.

final.title: Eid Campaign Films
blurb: Eid greeting films for Khooban Cola, Anar Dara holding and Heydari Dental Clinic, led by a 3D icosahedron wrapped in white Arabic calligraphy.
Glowing gold lanterns, geometric ornaments and embossed logo reveals give each client a festive signature in motion.

final.title: LER Canada Poster Series
blurb: A five-piece ad set for London Equipment Rentals: scissor and boom lift posters plus wide web banners under the 'Elevate Efficiency' headline.
A disciplined navy-and-orange system flips between light and dark variants while keeping feature icons and CTAs consistent.

final.title: Pamir Cola AI Commercials
blurb: Cinematic AI-generated commercials for the Pamir Cola family: a Shafa Cola bottle at a lavish Afghan feast, vapor-wrapped bottles erupting on ice, and drone sweeps over endless orange orchards.
SORA and VEO3 footage is graded and finished in After Effects into broadcast-ready product spots.

final.title: Azin Travel Brand Suite
blurb: A complete identity for Azin Travel: the negative-space airplane logomark, business cards, social campaigns and animated promos in a signature teal.
From Air Arabia fare posts in Herat to the Saudi branch announcement, one system covers print, social and motion.

final.title: Pamir Cola Product Posters
blurb: Photoshop product posters across the whole Pamir Cola portfolio — Deniz peach, Shafa juices and limonade, Hi Milk and Havas Chips.
Each SKU gets its own world: orchards, water splashes, a cow pasture and an astronaut on a yoghurt-and-basil moon.

final.title: Logofolio
blurb: Selected marks from 2025–2026: the golden Pamir Cola mountain-and-wave logo, Golden Egg poultry concepts, the Persian calligraphic 'Ebtekar' logotype and the Radmehr tailoring badge.
Calligraphy, badges and negative space put to work across beverage, poultry, homeware and craft clients.

final.title: Shafa Limonade Campaign Films
blurb: A season-long film campaign for Shafa Limonade: a SORA beach ad, a splash-crown animation, an underwater bottle plunge, citrus-orchard b-roll and a football spot.
AI-generated footage finished in After Effects carries the Dari tagline 'the start of an excitement' across every format.

final.title: Gulfood Dubai 2026
blurb: The full Pamir Cola presence at Gulfood Dubai 2026: a 3D-rendered exhibition booth with 'Strong Feel' and 'Nature Feel' lightbox key visuals, announcement graphics, teaser reels and a TV spot aired on GEM TV.
From the Burj Khalifa logo wipe to branded coverage of the live booth, one campaign took an Afghan beverage group to Dubai.

final.title: Berang Motor Posters
blurb: Three vehicle posters for Berang Co.: the gold-and-black BRG Crown 2025 rickshaw on a podium and two 200cc Emperor motorcycle ads.
Red-neon and mountain-road backdrops give Afghan two- and three-wheelers full showroom drama.

final.title: Shafa Summer Social Campaign
blurb: Social-first product visuals for the Shafa summer line: the five-flavor 330ml glass-bottle juice lineup, limonade poolside splashes, and a cola bottle beside an Afghan Kabuli pulao spread.
Lifestyle flat-lays and golden-hour scenes translate key-visual polish into a daily Instagram feed.

final.title: CGI Soda Reel
blurb: Spec 3D animations of beverage cans: photoreal Red Bull cans in a shallow-focus studio setup and a red soda can ringed by flying strawberries and carbonation bubbles.
Self-driven Blender studies in lighting, condensation and floating-fruit choreography.

final.title: Pamir Cola Packaging & Labels
blurb: Print-ready packaging across the group: a gold-patterned six-pack bottle carrier, Shafa and Alli juice pouch labels, Deniz 24-pack tray dielines and the gold-script Deniz water label seen in production.
Five Shafa-liveried cooler fridge wraps carry the flavor system straight into retail.

final.title: Ehya Physiotherapy Content
blurb: Patient education content for Ehya Physiotherapy Clinic in Herat: a green-and-white carousel on muscle and joint pain plus a filmed dry-needling reel.
Clinical close-ups and Dari caption blocks make treatment explainers feel calm and credible.

final.title: Shafa Juice AI Films
blurb: AI-assisted product films for the Shafa juice line — sour cherry, pomegranate, mango, orange and peach bottles staged in lush orchards and streams.
Photorealistic pours, splash choreography and moody pomegranate teasers, all composited and finished in After Effects.

final.title: Hi Dairy Billboards
blurb: Out-of-home campaign for the hi dairy range: blue billboards of milk, cream and cream-cheese cartons under the Dari tagline 'everything starts with hi'.
Documented live above busy Kabul avenues, from Chowk-e Gulha to the city's main arteries.

final.title: AI Motion Lab
blurb: Self-initiated AI motion studies: macro pomegranate seeds on deep red, a smoking faceted glass, a Pixar-style cow in a sunset meadow, a Kaaba parallax scene and a tropical beach film.
SORA, Seedance and Midjourney generations composited and graded in After Effects.

final.title: Ramadan 2026 Campaign
blurb: Pamir Cola's Ramadan 2026 push: an iftar-table key visual under lanterns and a mosque skyline, delivered as both poster and animation.
A glowing night-street animation and a calligraphic gift box — designed, dielined and photographed in print — complete the campaign.

final.title: Shafa Energy Drink Launch
blurb: Launch visuals for Shafa Energy Drink: the black-and-gold can held in a sunlit gym, planted on a snowy mountain summit and flexed beside a bodybuilder.
AI-assisted scene-building and Photoshop compositing position the can as instant peak-performance shorthand.

final.title: Hi Milk Kids Ad
blurb: A Pixar-style AI-animated commercial for hi cocoa milk: a boy in a striped hoodie reaching for the carton and straw in a pastel playroom.
Character animation generated with AI and finished in After Effects for the Pamir Cola dairy brand.

final.title: Ontario Door Supply Identity
blurb: A compact identity for Ontario Door Supply in London, Ontario: a line-art open-door logo, banner system and the director's business card.
Warm brown panels and angled door photography keep the trade brand sturdy and legible.

final.title: Green Apple Dental Reels
blurb: Short-form promo reels for the Green Apple dental clinic, led by a playful teeth-as-piano-keys composite.
Cut for Instagram with bilingual captions, turning clinical services into thumb-stopping content.

final.title: Idea Afghan Animation
blurb: Flat-design 2D animated promo for Idea Afghan — mint skies, paper-cut clouds and a cast of animated characters.
Scripted, illustrated and animated end-to-end in After Effects.
